title: Creeper Recrafted:FA
description: This resource pack makes the creeper look more plant/moss like but with Fresh Animations
body:
This pack reimagines the creepers with a design inspired by a Minecraft movie while trying to stay true to vanilla asthetic. These creepers have a more plant like look to them.

This is a fresh animations version of: [Creeper_Refreshed](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/creeper-refreshed)

![emf,etf required!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aecb91e7882d09ffcdd878c88bc3287f12682a53.png)
